creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
On Tue, 21 Nov 2000, Jacques A. Vidrine wrote:

# On Tue, Nov 21, 2000 at 09:57:37AM -0800, joseph@randomnetworks.com wrote:
# > >Number:         23009
# > >Category:       ports
# > >Synopsis:       UPDATE net/dante (1.1.5 -> 1.1.6)
# [snip]
# > >Description:
# > 
# > UPDATE net/dante (1.1.5 -> 1.1.6)
# > Changes Log :
# > "A number of new features have been added, including progress reporting of
# > slow operations for application feedback, DisplayParams class now provided 
# > with a range of PresetColours (for things such as intro/verse/bridge), and a 
# > Song 'Modified' utility."
# [snip]
# 
# You seem to have included the changes log for some other port :-)

	You are absolutely correct, my bad!  Here's the correct Change Log
entry :

"This release is a bugfix release intended to fix a problem where if
someone sent a negative hostnamelength, the Dante server's internal checks
would detect this and it would then abort with a "internal error
detected" message."

	Sorry about that.
